cookies.title: Choose how the site remembers your visit
cookies.body: We use essential storage for the website to work. With your permission, analytics can help us understand visits and improve trip planning.
cookies.essential_desc: Required for theme preferences, forms, and site stability.
cookies.analytics_desc: Helps us learn which pages are useful and where planning can improve.

search.placeholder: Search safaris, transfers, packages, Stone Town...
search.empty_body: Try a destination, activity, package style, safari park, transfer route, or send us a custom request.
